title: COMMUNITY CLOSET - 211info
text: INUKAI CLUB COMMUNITY CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a community closet with clothes, shoes, canned goods, home goods, and hygiene supplies. 560 SE 3rd Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted. No membership needed.
